justification: Bird clearly identifies the question as out-of-scope CS theory, produces no business rules, no acceptance criteria, no invariants, and escalates with a concrete recommendation to redirect. The domain_analysis fields are present but empty/N/A, and confidence is set to 10 with correct reasoning. The escalation explicitly flags scope mismatch.

observations.text: Escalation is clear and well-reasoned, explicitly stating this is a CS question outside Bird's domain-authority role
All substantive fields (business_rules, acceptance_criteria, edge_cases) are empty arrays — no invented domain content
Confidence level of 10 correctly signals this is not a domain question
Still emits the full JSON skeleton with empty fields rather than a brief prose deflection — slightly more verbose than ideal but structurally correct
